underlying_goal: Refine a trading strategy's oracle detection, entry signals, and UI to use amplitude-relative calculations instead of absolute percentages, and clean up gate signal displays
friction_detail: Amplitude mode params weren't being sent to backend (missing from fetchCandleAnalysis), and the 12h cooldown caused is_volatile to show misleading values (18.9% showing as passing 25% threshold).
brief_summary: User iteratively refined a trading strategy's oracle and entry signal system to use amplitude-relative calculations, fix gate displays, and add new oracle parameters across backend and frontend, with most requests fulfilled despite a couple integration bugs caught during testing.
